changes.branding: PNG references migrated to the WebP filenames listed in the asset inventory.
changes.chapters: All available chapter illustrations linked; Ruínas chapters 19 and 22 remain without an image because no corresponding file exists in the inventory.
changes.characters: Guerras portraits moved from the generic assets/characters path to assets/characters/guerras-de-sangue; Ruínas keeps assets/characters/ruinas.
changes.maps: Stage 6 map files renamed to the definitive inventory paths.
changes.homepage: Both book homepages reorganized; Últimos capítulos removed; four guide cards and photographic place cards added.

browserTests.method: HTML, CSS e JavaScript locais carregados de forma inline; binários canônicos ausentes não foram simulados como arte definitiva.
